title: Senior Software Engineer - 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
